chapter_title: About the Forbiddanceof AlWisal 29 in Fasting

hadith_entries.text:
1014. Narrated Anas; 'The Messenger of Allah said:
"Do not do Al Wisal." They said; 'But you do it O Messenger
of Allah!' He said: “I am not like anyone of you. Indeed, my
Lord feeds me and gives me drink." (At-Termizi).
Abu-Issa said; 'The Hadith of Anas is Hasan Saheeh and
the people of knowledge see that doing Al Wisal is disliked.
And it was narrated that Abdullah ibn Az-Zubayr did Al
Wisal.'
